headline: Bernstein Downgrades Rollins to Market Perform, Lowers Price Target to $52
summary: Bernstein  analyst Connor Cerniglia   downgrades Rollins (NYSE:ROL) from Outperform to Market Perform and lowers the price target from $70 to $52.
